ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player's club */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., FW, MF, DF, GK) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches the player has played */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Number of matches the player has started */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Total minutes the player has played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the player */,
  "passes_completed" REAL /* Percentage of passes completed by the player */,
  "penalty_goals" INTEGER /* Number of penalty goals scored by the player */,
  "penalty_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of penalty attempts made by the player */,
  "xG" REAL /* Expected goals (xG) scored by the player */,
  "xA" REAL /* Expected assists (xA) made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left or right) of the player */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "market_value" INTEGER /* Current market value of the player in euros */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances made by the player */,
  "aerials_won" INTEGER /* Number of aerial duels won by the player */,
  "aerials_lost" INTEGER /* Number of aerial duels lost by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the player based on performance metrics */,
  "form_rating" REAL /* Current form rating of the player (e.g., 1-10 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the club is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the club plays */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Final result of the match (e.g., 2-1) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's match statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the match */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Shots taken by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target by the player in the match */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Passes attempted by the player in the match */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Passes completed by the player in the match */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Dribbles made by the player in the match */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Tackles made by the player in the match */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the match */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions made by the player in the match */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Clearances made by the player in the match */,
  "aerials_won" INTEGER /* Aerial duels won by the player in the match */,
  "aerials_lost" INTEGER /* Aerial duels lost by the player in the match */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player in the match */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Fouls suffered by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the player in the match */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
